description.short: Plant-floor skills for production, capacity, quality, and compliance work.
description.full: A Copilot Cowork plugin that equips plant managers, production supervisors, and quality engineers with seven manufacturing-ops skills: daily status reporting, capacity planning, SOP and process documentation, shift handoff and line-down runbooks, engineering and process change requests, multi-domain risk assessment, and compliance audit prep across OSHA, ISO 9001, IATF 16949, FDA 21 CFR, and GMP.
